description.en: Delete a sheet tab from a Google Sheets spreadsheet by its sheet ID.
description.de: Lösche ein Tabellenblatt aus einer Google Sheets-Tabelle anhand seiner Blatt-ID.
description.es: Delete a sheet tab from a Google Sheets spreadsheet by its sheet ID.
description.fr: Delete a sheet tab from a Google Sheets spreadsheet by its sheet ID.
description.ro: Delete a sheet tab from a Google Sheets spreadsheet by its sheet ID.
description.it: Delete a sheet tab from a Google Sheets spreadsheet by its sheet ID.

description.en: The numeric ID of the sheet tab to delete (use Get Spreadsheet to find sheet IDs).
